name: ability-arc_trajectory
overview: Emits influence along a parabolic arc.
description: Effect travels in a curved path affected by gravity or similar force, landing at a distant point.

name: ability-homing
description: Once activated, continuously corrects course toward the closest relevant object.

name: ability-orthogonal
overview: Acts on an axis perpendicular to facing direction.
description: Influence extends sideways, above, or below rather than straight ahead.
keywords: perpendicular, cross-axis, lateral, column, blind spot

name: ability-reflect
description: Uses reflection to reach positions not directly accessible; angle determines destination.

name: ability-auto_target
overview: Automatically selects and affects the optimal target.
description: System determines which object to influence regardless of player aim.

name: ability-area_burst
overview: Affects a surrounding area on activation.
description: Influence radiates outward from a point, covering a region rather than a single target.

name: ability-displace
overview: Forcibly moves objects to new positions.
description: Applies positional force — pushes, pulls, or relocates without destroying.

name: ability-sweep
overview: Moves through a wide area in one motion.
description: A linear or fan-shaped influence travels across the field, affecting everything in its path.

name: ability-fan
overview: Deploys in a fan or cone shape.
description: Spreads outward with trade-offs between reach and width of effect.

name: ability-instant_line
overview: Creates an instantaneous line of influence.
description: Affects everything along a straight line with no travel time.

name: ability-obscure
description: Creates zones of uncertainty by blocking visibility or altering perception.

name: ability-delayed
overview: Effect activates after a time delay.
description: Placed or triggered now, but influence manifests later; requires anticipation.

name: ability-suspend
description: Pauses movement, behavior, or state of an object without removing it.

name: ability-negate
description: Counteracts an approaching effect or object, preventing its intended result.

name: ability-reshape
overview: Alters the structure of the environment.
description: Modifies terrain, boundaries, or spatial rules — creating, removing, or transforming features.
